name: node-prelude-ls
title: node-prelude-ls
summary: functionally oriented utility library for Livescript
description:
functionally oriented utility library for Livescript
This library is a base library for LiveScript, including tools
and basic functions, for instance mathematical basic functions.
.
LiveScript is a functional programming language that compiles
to JavaScript.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-prelude-ls because functionally oriented utility library for Livescript.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-prelude-ls as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-prelude-ls with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-prelude-ls --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
